payload.label: basket
payload.long_description: Partial/cropped dark bluish-gray rectangular fabric storage basket with a light tan loop handle stitched to the side and a lighter tan trim along the top rim; textured woven or herringbone-like fabric visible, upright and edge-cropped on the right side of the image, appears to be a small-to-medium collapsible storage bin about 0.8 m from the camera.
